Portrait sessions with editorial direction

A calm, guided experience built around flattering light, easy prompts, and images that feel like a magazine feature — still unmistakably you.

  • Best for: founders, creatives, couples
  • Includes: wardrobe support + location scouting
  • Deliverables: curated gallery + print-ready files
Explore sessions →

Weddings & engagements — refined, documentary coverage

Quiet confidence on a fast day. We capture the honest moments and the elevated portraits — with timelines and lighting handled.

  • Best for: full weekends, city hall, elopements
  • Includes: timeline + portrait plan
  • Option: 48-hour sneak peek
View wedding coverage →

Events & celebrations — fast, flattering, candid

From brand dinners to milestone parties, we photograph the energy and the details — with people-first storytelling and polished edits.

  • Best for: launches, birthdays, galas
  • Includes: candid + editorial portraits
  • Delivery: highlight set + full gallery
Plan your event coverage →

Brand photography — story-led visuals that convert

Campaign images and evergreen assets built around your positioning — consistent, editorial, and designed for web + press.

  • Best for: founders, teams, launches
  • Includes: creative direction + shotlist
  • Usage: web, press, social, ads
Build a campaign set →

Product & detail photography — warm, crisp, tactile

Elevated still life and product detail images with studio-level polish — built for ecommerce, lookbooks, and ad creative.

  • Best for: ecommerce, packaging, tabletop
  • Includes: styling suggestions + lighting plan
  • Deliverables: hero set + variants
See product coverage →

Lifestyle & family sessions — natural, editorial, home-ready

Simple prompts, beautiful light, and space for real connection — photographed with warmth and a polished, print-first finish.

  • Best for: families, couples, milestones
  • Includes: timing + location guidance
  • Delivery: curated gallery + print options
Plan a lifestyle session →
Service Overview Request Dates

MNY Photo — warm light, calm direction

We’re a small studio built for clients who want images that feel honest and elevated. Minimal gear on set, maximal attention to light, pacing, and comfort.

  • Based in NYC, available for travel
  • Editorial style with modern warmth
  • Guided experience from planning to delivery
Meet the studio →

A process that protects the vibe

We plan around light, movement, and story — then keep the session day simple. Direction is gentle and specific, so you never feel “posed.”

  • Creative direction + shot flow
  • Location + timing recommendations
  • Editing that stays true to skin tones
How we work →

The client experience: clear, warm, intentional

Expect clear communication, timeline-friendly pacing, and an easy gallery experience. We help you choose favorites and prep images for print and web.

  • Guided prep call + wardrobe notes
  • Candid moments + hero portraits
  • Print-ready delivery + sharing links
See what to expect →

Contact Us

Who we are

A calm studio with a cinematic eye.

MNY Photo is built for clients who want warmth, clarity, and images that feel honest — while still looking like a feature.

Start an inquiry View work

A small team, a focused craft

We started with a simple promise: make people feel comfortable, then craft images that live beyond a trend.

The studio is intentionally small — so communication is direct, timelines are respected, and every gallery gets real attention. We photograph with warmth and precision, and edit with an eye for consistency across an entire story.

Our story

A warm, modern editorial look — built for real life and real timelines.

We plan around light and pacing, then keep sessions calm and simple. That’s how galleries start to feel like a story — not a checklist.

  • Light-first planning
  • Clear direction, never forced
  • Editing that respects skin tones

Values

The guardrails that keep sessions calm — and galleries consistent.

Warmth over hype

Trends come and go. We aim for warmth, clarity, and images you’ll still love years from now.

Direction that feels natural

We lead with simple prompts and pacing so you never feel stuck or overly “posed.”

Print-first craft

Color, skin tone, and contrast matter. Our edits are made to hold up in print and across campaigns.

Clear communication

The best sessions feel easy. We keep expectations and timelines straightforward from the first email.

Our approach

We start with your goals and your audience, then build a shot flow that fits your time and energy. Light comes first — and everything else follows.

Client experience

Expect a guided, low-pressure session with direct feedback. You’ll never wonder what to do with your hands.

Editing philosophy

Consistent, warm, and true to your skin. We chase clean tones and a cinematic softness that doesn’t look filtered.

Let’s plan something calm and beautiful.

Tell us what you’re planning — we’ll recommend the right coverage and a light-first timeline.

Contact Us View Work

MNY Photo

Bright, cinematic photography — made to be printed, shared, and remembered.
